subcodes.first_line: Say: O people! By God, We have not come to spread corruption in the earth, but rather to reform it and to reveal what lieth treasured within it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا قوم تالله ماجئنا لنفسد فی الارض بل لاصلاحها و اظهار ما کنز فیها
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
